last_task.subject:
Fleet update: Spark (.12), Loom (.14), and Forge (.15) are now connected to the same Claude Max 100 plan as Spark (.11) in the loop-starter-kit.

What do we need for Iris? Should we start with Claude then work our way up to OpenRouter is or just a key needed? What models do we expect to use? Email me updates and queue whatever tasks you want to handle next as most of the agents should be operational and dispatching now.
